AfmuRepairs.description: When written: when repairing modules using the Auto Field Maintenance Unit (AFMU)

ApproachBody.description: When written: when in Supercruise, and distance from planet drops to within the 'Orbital Cruise' zone

ApproachSettlement.description: When written: when approaching a planetary settlement

AsteroidCracked.description: When written: when the player has broken up a ‘Motherlode’ asteroid for mining

Backpack.description: Lists the contents of the backpack, in a separate backpack.json file

BackpackChange.description: This is written when there is any change to the contents of the suit backpack – note this can be written at the same time as other events like UseConsumable

BookDropship.description: This event is logged when signing up to fight at a recruitment desk

BookTaxi.description: This event is logged when booking a taxi transport

properties.name: Retreat
properties.description: indicates if requested for exit from combat zone

Bounty.description: When written: player is awarded a bounty for a kill

properties.name: Rewards
properties.description: An array of Faction names and the Reward values, as the target can have multiple bounties payable by different factions. Not used for skimmers.(See Reward)

properties.name: SharedWithOthers
properties.description: if credit for the kill is shared with other players, this has the number of other players involved

properties.name: Reward
properties.description: Used instead of Rewards when the bounty is for a skimmer

BuyExplorationData.description: When Written: when buying system data via the galaxy map

BuyMicroResources.description: This event is logged when buying microresources

properties.name: Name
properties.description: Old format (used for example at supplies vendor)

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: Old format (used for example at supplies vendor)

properties.name: Count
properties.description: Old format (used for example at supplies vendor)

properties.name: TotalCount
properties.description: New format (eg at Fleet Carrier bartender)

properties.name: MicroResources
properties.description: New format (eg at Fleet Carrier bartender)

BuySuit.description: This event is logged when buying a new suit

BuyTradeData.description: When Written: when buying trade data in the galaxy map

BuyWeapon.description: This event is logged when purchasing a new hand weapon

CancelDropship.description: This event is logged if the player cancels their journey to a combat zone

CancelTaxi.description: This event is logged if the player cancels a booked taxi trip

CapShipBond.description: When written: The player has been rewarded for a capital ship combat

Cargo.description: When written: at startup, note this is now written slightly later in startup, after we have initialised missions, so we can detect if any cargo came from an abandoned delivery mission. The first Cargo event in the file will contain the full inventory, others just indicate a separate file has been written. The full data is now written to a separate file Cargo.json. A simple event (with no parameters) is written to the main journal file when the cargo file is updated.

CargoDepot.description: When written: when collecting or delivering cargo for a wing mission, or if a wing member updates progress. The CargoType and Count are included when you collect or deliver goods, they are not included for a wing update. The Progress value actually represents pending progress for goods in transit: (ItemsCollected-ItemsDelivered)/TotalItemsToDeliver

properties.name: CargoType
properties.description: Not included for UpdateType of WingUpdate

properties.name: Count
properties.description: Not included for UpdateType of WingUpdate

CargoTransfer.description: When transferring cargo between ship and fleet carrier, or between ship and SRV

CarrierBuy.description: Player has bought a fleet carrier

CarrierCancelDecommission.description: At the time the player cancels decommission

CarrierDecommission.description: At the time the player requests decommission

CarrierDepositFuel.description: Any player giving fuel to the carrier

properties.name: Total
properties.description: Total amount of fuel after donation

CarrierDockingPermission.description: The carrier owner has changed the docking permission criteria

CarrierFinance.description: Change to tax rate or reserve

CarrierJump.description: This is similar to FSDJump and Location, but it is written if the player is online and docked at a fleet carrier when the carrier jumps. Note it does not include the distance jumped, or fuel used.

properties.name: StarPos
properties.description: star position, as a Json array [x, y, z], relative to Sol in Ly

properties.name: Powers
properties.description: If the player is pledged to a Power in Powerplay, and the star system is involved in powerplay

properties.name: PowerplayStateControlProgress
properties.description: The current amount of control within the specific powerplay state

properties.name: PowerplayStateReinforcement
properties.description: Merits gained towards reinforcing the system and increasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayStateUndermining
properties.description: Merits gained towards undermining the system and decreasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayConflictProgress
properties.description: When the system is unoccupied and 1 or more powers are fighting for control by reaching 120k merits.

CarrierJumpCancelled.description: This is logged when a jump is cancelled

CarrierJumpRequest.description: At the time the player requests the jump, not the jump itself

CarrierLocation.description: Carrier Location. Written on startup and after a carrier jump.

CarrierTradeOrder.description: The carrier owner has requested the carrier buys or sells goods (or cancels such an order)

ChangeCrewRole.description: When written: when in a crew on someone else's ship, player switched crew role

ClearSavedGame.description: When written: If you should ever reset your game

CodexEntry.description: When written: when a new discovery is added to the Codex

properties.name: NearestDestination
properties.description: The NearestDestination is added if within 50km of a location listed in the navigation panel

properties.name: IsNewEntry
properties.description: The IsNewEntry field is optional depending on the results of the scan

properties.name: NewTraitsDiscovered
properties.description: The NewTraitsDiscovered field is optional depending on the results of the scan

properties.name: Traits
properties.description: The Traits field is only available for entries that have unlocked traits

CollectCargo.description: When Written: when scooping cargo from space or planet surface

properties.name: Type_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Type

CollectItems.description: When picking up items from the ground

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Name

ColonisationBeaconDeployed.description: When Written: when a colonisation beacon is deployed

ColonisationConstructionDepot.description: When Written: Every 15 seconds while docked at a construction depot

ColonisationContribution.description: When Written: when contributing materials to a colonisation effort

ColonisationSystemClaim.description: When Written: When a system is claimed for colonisation by paying for the claim.

ColonisationSystemClaimRelease.description: When Written: when a colonisation claim is released

Commander.description: When written: at the start of the LoadGame process. This is written before the inventory, loadout, etc

CommitCrime.description: When written: when a crime is recorded against the player

CommunityGoal.description: When written: when the game retrieves info on community goals from the server, and the data has changed since last time. This event contains the current status of all community goals the player is currently subscribed to.

CommunityGoalDiscard.description: When written: when opting out of a community goal

CommunityGoalJoin.description: When Written: when signing up to a community goal

CommunityGoalReward.description: When Written: when receiving a reward for a community goal

CompleteConstruction.description: When written: upon completing a colonisation construction

Continued.description: When written: if the journal file grows to 500k lines, we write this event, close the file, and start a new one. The new journalname will increase the partnumber, ex: {datetime}.02.log. The new journal will start with a Fileheader and continue.

CreateSuitLoadout.description: This event is logged when the player creates a new suit loadout

CrewAssign.description: When written: when changing the task assignment of a member of crew

CrewFire.description: When written: when dismissing a member of crew

CrewHire.description: When written: when engaging a new member of crew

CrewLaunchFighter.description: When written: when in multicrew, in Helm player's log, when a crew member launches a fighter

properties.name: Crew
properties.description: Name of crew member launching in fighter

CrewMemberJoins.description: When written: When another player joins your ship's crew

CrewMemberQuits.description: When written: When another player leaves your ship's crew

CrewMemberRoleChange.description: When written: in Multicrew, Helm's log, when another crew player changes role

CrimeVictim.description: When written: when another player commits a crime against the current player

DataScanned.description: When written: when scanning some types of data links

DatalinkScan.description: When written: when scanning a data link

DatalinkVoucher.description: When written: when scanning a datalink generates a reward

DeleteSuitLoadout.description: This event is logged when the player deletes a suit loadout

DeliverPowerMicroResources.description: When Written: when delivering power micro-resources.

properties.name: TotalCount
properties.description: The total number of micro-resources delivered.

properties.name: MarketID
properties.description: The ID of the market where the delivery took place.

properties.name: KillerName
properties.description: When killed by a single entity

properties.name: KillerShip
properties.description: When killed by a single entity

properties.name: KillerRank
properties.description: When killed by a single entity

properties.name: KillerName_Localised
properties.description: When killed by a single entity

DiscoveryScan.description: When written: when using the discovery scanner, and new body discoveries are displayed in the cockpit info window. Note you can get two or three of these in a row, where some bodies are discovered by the automatic passive scan, before the active scan is complete.

Disembark.description: This event is logged when the player steps out of a ship or SRV

properties.name: SRV
properties.description: true if getting out of SRV, false if getting out of a ship

properties.name: Taxi
properties.description: true when getting out of a taxi transposrt ship

properties.name: Multicrew
properties.description: true when getting out of another player’s vessel

properties.name: ID
properties.description: player’s ship ID (if players own vessel)

DockFighter.description: When written: when docking a fighter back with the mothership

DockSRV.description: When written: when docking an SRV with the ship

Docked.description: When written: when landing at landing pad in a space station, outpost, or surface settlement

properties.name: StationServices
properties.description: StationServices can include: Dock, Autodock, BlackMarket, Commodities, Contacts, Exploration, Initiatives, Missions, Outfitting, CrewLounge, Rearm, Refuel, Repair, Shipyard, Tuning, Workshop, MissionsGenerated, Facilitator, Research, FlightController, StationOperations, OnDockMission, Powerplay, SearchAndRescue. New in v3.7: shop, carriermanagement, carrierfuel, carriervendor, livery, modulepacks, voucherredemption

properties.name: StationEconomy
properties.description: Only if station has a single economy

properties.name: StationEconomy_Localised
properties.description: Only if station has a single economy

properties.name: StationEconomies
properties.description: Only if station has multiple economies

properties.name: Wanted
properties.description: Only if docking when wanted locally

properties.name: ActiveFine
properties.description: Only if any fine is active

properties.name: CockpitBreach
properties.description: true (only if landing with breached cockpit)

DockingCancelled.description: When written: when the player cancels a docking request

DockingDenied.description: When written: when the station denies a docking request

DockingGranted.description: When written: when a docking request is granted

DockingRequested.description: When written: when the player requests docking at a station

DockingTimeout.description: When written: when a docking request has timed out

DropItems.description: When discarding on-foot items from the player's inventory

DropshipDeploy.description: When exiting a shuttle dropship at a conflict zone

properties.name: Type_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Type

properties.name: PowerplayOrigin
properties.description: If the cargo is related to powerplay delivery from outlying systems back to the centre. Starsystem name.

Embark.description: This event is logged when a player (on foot) gets into a ship or SRV

properties.name: SRV
properties.description: true if getting into SRV, false if getting into a ship

properties.name: Taxi
properties.description: true when boarding a taxi transport ship

properties.name: Multicrew
properties.description: true when boarding another player’s vessel

properties.name: ID
properties.description: player’s ship ID (if players own vessel)

EndCrewSession.description: When written: when the captain in multicrew disbands the crew

properties.name: OnCrime
properties.description: true if crew disbanded as a result of a crime in a lawful session

EngineerContribution.description: When written: when offering items cash or bounties to an Engineer to gain access

EngineerCraft.description: When Written: when requesting an engineer upgrade

EngineerLegacyConvert.description: When written: when converting a pre-2.4 engineered module. This is generated when converting, or previewing a conversion of a legacy module to the new system.

properties.name: IsPreview
properties.description: To indicate whether this entry has been generated from a conversion, or just a preview.

EngineerProgress.description: When Written: when a player increases their access to an engineer or at startup. At startup the Engineers array is written.

properties.name: RankProgress
properties.description: Uncertain whether this is actually logged

EscapeInterdiction.description: When written: Player has escaped interdiction

FCMaterials.description: When trading with a Fleet Carrier Bartender for materials, a file is written with the pricelist to FCMaterials.json

FSDJump.description: When written: when jumping from one star system to another

properties.name: Taxi
properties.description: True when inside a taxi transport ship

properties.name: Multicrew
properties.description: True when inside another player's ship

properties.name: StarPos
properties.description: star position, as a Json array [x, y, z], relative to Sol in Ly

properties.name: Powers
properties.description: If the player is pledged to a Power in Powerplay, and the star system is involved in powerplay

properties.name: PowerplayStateControlProgress
properties.description: The current amount of control within the specific powerplay state

properties.name: PowerplayStateReinforcement
properties.description: Merits gained towards reinforcing the system and increasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayStateUndermining
properties.description: Merits gained towards undermining the system and decreasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayConflictProgress
properties.description: When the system is unoccupied and 1 or more powers are fighting for control by reaching 120k merits.

FSDTarget.description: When written: when selecting a star system to jump to. When following a multi-jump route, this will typically appear for the next star, during a jump, ie after StartJump but before the FSDJump

FSSAllBodiesFound.description: When written: after having identified all bodies in the system

FSSBodySignals.description: This event is written when completing a Full Spectrum Scan of a starsystem, to list the number of SAA signals found in the system (as shown in-game in the top-right panel)

FSSDiscoveryScan.description: When written: when performing a full system scan (Honk)

FSSSignalDiscovered.description: When written: when zooming in on a signal using the FSS scanner

properties.name: USSType
properties.description: If a Unidentified Signal Source(USS) Event

properties.name: USSType_Localised
properties.description: If a Unidentified Signal Source(USS) Event

properties.name: SpawningState
properties.description: the BGS state that triggered this event, if relevant

properties.name: ThreatLevel
properties.description: If a Unidentified Signal Source(USS) Event

properties.name: TimeRemaining
properties.description: remaining lifetime in seconds, if relevant

FactionKillBond.description: When written: Player rewarded for taking part in a combat zone

FetchRemoteModule.description: When written: when requesting a module is transferred from storage at another station

properties.name: ServerId
properties.description: FDev ID for the module, not a unique identifier for the module instance

FighterDestroyed.description: When written: when a ship-launched fighter is destroyed

FighterRebuilt.description: When written: when a ship's fighter is rebuilt in the hangar

properties.name: Odyssey
properties.description: True for gameversions >= 4.0, both Horizons and Odyssey.

properties.name: gameversion
properties.description: Which version of the game produced the log (will indicate if beta)

Friends.description: When written: when receiving information about a change in a friend's status. Also written at startup for friends who are already online.

properties.name: Status
properties.description: One of the following: Requested, Declined, Added, Lost, Offline, Online

FuelScoop.description: When written: when scooping fuel from a star

HeatDamage.description: When written: when taking damage due to overheating

properties.name: PowerBefore
properties.description: The power that owned the holo screen

properties.name: PowerAfter
properties.description: The power that now owns the holo screen

HullDamage.description: When written: when hull health drops below a threshold (20% steps)

properties.name: PlayerPilot
properties.description: True if player is piloting the ship/fighter taking damage

Interdicted.description: When written: player was interdicted by player or npc

properties.name: Power
properties.description: If npc is working for a power

properties.name: Power
properties.description: If npc is working for a power

JetConeBoost.description: When written: when enough material has been collected from a solar jet code (at a white dwarf or neutron star) for a jump boost

JetConeDamage.description: When written: when passing through the jet code from a white dwarf or neutron star has caused damage to a ship module

JoinACrew.description: When written: When you join another player ship's crew

KickCrewMember.description: When written: When you force another player to leave your ship's crew

properties.name: OnCrime
properties.description: True if player is automatically kicked for committing a crime in a lawful session

LaunchDrone.description: When written: when using any type of drone/limpet

LaunchFighter.description: When written: when launching a fighter

properties.name: PlayerControlled
properties.description: Whether player is controlling the fighter from launch

LaunchSRV.description: When written: deploying the SRV from a ship onto planet surface

LeaveBody.description: When written: when flying away from a planet, and distance increases above the 'Orbital Cruise' altitude

Liftoff.description: When written: when taking off from planet surface

properties.name: PlayerControlled
properties.description: false if ship dismissed when player is in SRV, true if player is taking off

properties.name: Latitude
properties.description: only if player flying in ship)

properties.name: Longitude
properties.description: only if player flying in ship)

properties.name: Odyssey
properties.description: Whether Game has Odyssey enabled. Only present if in Odyssey game mode

properties.name: Group
properties.description: name of group (if in a group session)

properties.name: StartDead
properties.description: only present if starting dead: see Resurrect

Loadout.description: When written: at startup, when loading from main menu, or when switching ships, or after changing the ship in Outfitting, or when docking SRV back in mothership

properties.name: ShipID
properties.description: Ship id number (indicates which of your ships you are in)

properties.name: UnladenMass
properties.description: Mass of Hull and Modules, excludes fuel and cargo

properties.name: MaxJumpRange
properties.description: based on zero cargo, and just enough fuel for 1 jump

LoadoutEquipModule.description: This event is logged when a player adds a weapon to a suit loadout

properties.name: ModuleName
properties.description: New weapon or other item added to loadout

LoadoutRemoveModule.description: This event is logged when a player removes a weapon from a suit loadout

properties.name: ModuleName
properties.description: Weapon or other item removed from loadout

Location.description: When written: at startup, or when being resurrected at a station

properties.name: DistFromStarLS
properties.description: If not close to main star

properties.name: Taxi
properties.description: True when inside a taxi transport ship

properties.name: Multicrew
properties.description: True when inside another player's ship

properties.name: StarPos
properties.description: star position, as a Json array [x, y, z], relative to Sol in Ly

properties.name: Powers
properties.description: If the player is pledged to a Power in Powerplay, and the star system is involved in powerplay

properties.name: PowerplayStateControlProgress
properties.description: The current amount of control within the specific powerplay state

properties.name: PowerplayStateReinforcement
properties.description: Merits gained towards reinforcing the system and increasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayStateUndermining
properties.description: Merits gained towards undermining the system and decreasing the system strength

properties.name: PowerplayConflictProgress
properties.description: When the system is unoccupied and 1 or more powers are fighting for control by reaching 120k merits.

properties.name: StationFaction
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationGovernment
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationGovernment_Localised
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationServices
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationEconomy
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationEconomy_Localised
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

properties.name: StationEconomies
properties.description: If starting docked in a station

Market.description: When written: when accessing the commodity market in a station. A separate file Market.json is written to the same folder as the journal, containing full market price info.

MarketBuy.description: When Written: when purchasing goods in the market

properties.name: Type_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Type

MarketSell.description: When Written: when selling goods in the market

properties.name: Type_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Type

properties.name: BlackMarket
properties.description: Whether selling in a black market

MassModuleStore.description: When written: when putting multiple modules into storage

MaterialCollected.description: When Written: whenever materials are collected

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Name

MaterialDiscarded.description: When Written: if materials are discarded

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Name

MaterialDiscovered.description: When Written: when a new material is discovered

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Name

MaterialTrade.description: When written: when exchanging materials at the Material trader contact

Materials.description: When written: at startup, when loading from main menu into game

MiningRefined.description: When Written: when mining fragments are converted unto a unit of cargo by refinery

MissionAbandoned.description: When Written: when a mission has been abandoned

MissionAccepted.description: When Written: when starting a mission

MissionCompleted.description: When Written: when a mission is completed

properties.name: PermitsAwarded
properties.description: Appears in journal manual, but not in actual events.

properties.name: CommodityReward
properties.description: Names and counts of any commodity rewards

properties.name: MaterialsReward
properties.description: Name, category and count of any material rewards

MissionFailed.description: When Written: when a mission has failed

MissionRedirected.description: When written: when a mission is updated with a new destination

ModuleBuy.description: When Written: when buying a module in outfitting

properties.name: StoredItem
properties.description: If existing module in slot is stored

properties.name: StoredItem_Localised
properties.description: If existing module in slot is stored

properties.name: SellItem
properties.description: If existing module in slot is sold

properties.name: SellItem_Localised
properties.description: If existing module in slot is sold

properties.name: SellPrice
properties.description: If existing module in slot is sold

ModuleBuyAndStore.description: When Written: when buying a module and directly storing it in outfitting

properties.name: BuyItem
properties.description: The module being purchased and stored

ModuleInfo.description: When written: when looking at the cockpit Right Hand Side modules info panel, if data has changed. This also writes a ModulesInfo.json file alongside the journal, listing the modules in the same order as displayed.

ModuleRetrieve.description: When written: when fetching a previously stored module

ModuleSell.description: When Written: when selling a module in outfitting

ModuleSellRemote.description: When written: when selling a module in storage at another station

properties.name: ServerId
properties.description: FDev ID for the module, not a unique identifier for the module instance

ModuleStore.description: When written: when storing a module in Outfitting

properties.name: ReplacementItem
properties.description: If a core module is stored. Documented, but appears to be unused.

properties.name: StoredItem_Localised
properties.description: If a core module is stored. Documented, but appears to be unused.

ModuleSwap.description: When Written: when moving a module to a different slot on the ship

MultiSellExplorationData.description: When written: when selling exploration data in Cartographics, a page at a time

NavBeaconScan.description: When written: when scanning a navigation beacon, before the scan data for all the bodies in the system is written into the journal

NavRoute.description: When plotting a multi-star route, the file NavRoute.json is written in the same directory as the journal, with a list of stars along that route

NavRouteClear.description: When written: When the current plotted nav route is cleared. Can be written to NavRoute.json with an empty Route array.

NewCommander.description: When written: Creating a new commander

NpcCrewPaidWage.description: This is written when crew receive wages

NpcCrewRank.description: This is written when a crew member's combat rank increases

Outfitting.description: Written when accessing the outfitting menu. The full parts pricelist is written to a separate file Outfitting.json.

PVPKill.description: When written: when this player has killed another player

Passengers.description: When written: at startup, when loading the saved game file

PayBounties.description: When written: when paying off bounties

properties.name: Amount
properties.description: Total amount paid, including any broker fee

properties.name: BrokerPercentage
properties.description: Present if paid via a broker

properties.name: Faction
properties.description: If paying off an individual faction's fines

properties.name: Faction_Localised
properties.description: If paying off an individual faction's fines

properties.name: Amount
properties.description: Total amount paid, including any broker fee

properties.name: BrokerPercentage
properties.description: Present if paid via a broker

properties.name: Faction
properties.description: If paying off an individual faction's fines

properties.name: Faction_Localised
properties.description: If paying off an individual faction's fines

Powerplay.description: When written: at startup, if player has pledged to a power

PowerplayCollect.description: When written: when collecting powerplay commodities for delivery

PowerplayDefect.description: When written: when a player defects from one power to another

PowerplayDeliver.description: When written: when delivering powerplay commodities

PowerplayFastTrack.description: When written: when paying to fast-track allocation of commodities

PowerplayJoin.description: When written: when joining up with a power

PowerplayLeave.description: When written: when leaving a power

PowerplayMerits.description: When written: when receiving merits from a power

PowerplayRank.description: When written: when ranking up with a power

PowerplaySalary.description: When written: when receiving salary payment from a power

PowerplayVote.description: When written: when voting for a system expansion

properties.name: System
properties.description: Documented, but appears to be unused.

PowerplayVoucher.description: When written: when receiving payment for powerplay combat

Promotion.description: When written: when the player’s rank increases. Only the relevant ranks are included.

properties.name: MotherlodeMaterial_Localised
properties.description: If it’s a motherlode. The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as MotherlodeMaterial

RebootRepair.description: When written: when the reboot repair function is used

properties.name: Modules
properties.description: Array of names of modules repaired

ReceiveText.description: When written: when a text message is received from another player or npc

RedeemVoucher.description: When Written: when claiming payment for combat bounties and bonds

properties.name: Amount
properties.description: Net amount received, after any broker fee

Repair.description: When Written: when repairing the ship. When repairing on a FleetCarrier, you can get a list of the modules repaired

properties.name: Item
properties.description: all, wear, hull, paint, or name of module

RepairDrone.description: When written: when the player's ship has been repaired by a repair drone. Each of the values indicate the amount of damage that has been repaired

Reputation.description: When written: at startup (after Rank and Progress). This gives the player's reputation (on a scale of -100..+100) with the superpowers

RequestPowerMicroResources.description: When Written: when requesting power micro-resources.

properties.name: TotalCount
properties.description: The total number of micro-resources requested.

properties.name: MarketID
properties.description: The ID of the market where the request took place.

ReservoirReplenished.description: When fuel is moved from one fuel tank to another

RestockVehicle.description: When Written: when purchasing an SRV or Fighter

Resurrect.description: When written: when the player restarts after death

properties.name: Option
properties.description: The option selected on the insurance rebuy screen

SAAScanComplete.description: When written: after using the Surface Area Analysis Scanner

SAASignalsFound.description: When written: when using Surface Area Analysis Scanner on a planet or rings

SRVDestroyed.description: When written: when the player's SRV is destroyed

Scan.description: When Written: basic or detailed discovery scan of a star, planet or moon. This is also generated when scanning a navigation beacon in a populated system, to record info about all the bodies in the system.

properties.name: SemiMajorAxis
properties.description: Orbital Parameters for any Star/Planet/Moon (except main star of single-star system)

properties.name: Eccentricity
properties.description: Orbital Parameters for any Star/Planet/Moon (except main star of single-star system)

properties.name: OrbitalInclination
properties.description: Orbital Parameters for any Star/Planet/Moon (except main star of single-star system)

properties.name: Periapsis
properties.description: Orbital Parameters for any Star/Planet/Moon (except main star of single-star system)

properties.name: OrbitalPeriod
properties.description: Orbital Parameters for any Star/Planet/Moon (except main star of single-star system)

properties.name: RotationPeriod
properties.description: Written for Star/Planet/Moon. If rotating (in seconds)

properties.name: Rings
properties.description: Written for Star/Planet/Moon. If rings present.

properties.name: ReserveLevel
properties.description: Written for Planet/Moon. If rings present.

ScanBaryCentre.description: When scanning one body of a binary pair, you will get an event detailing the orbital parameters of their BaryCentre

ScanOrganic.description: This event is logged when the player uses the Organic Sampling Tool to scan, log or analyse organic discoveries. The first scan is Log, subsequent scans are Sample until fully scanned, final scan is Analyse

Scanned.description: When written: when the player's ship has been scanned (The Scan Detected indication is at the start of the scan, this is written at the end of a successful scan)

ScientificResearch.description: When written: when contributing materials to a research community goal

properties.name: Name_Localised
properties.description: The localised value will be omitted if it is exactly the same as Name

Screenshot.description: When Written: when a screen snapshot is saved. The latitude, longitude, altitude and heading will be included if on a planet or in low-altitude flight.

SearchAndRescue.description: When written: when delivering items to a Search and Rescue contact

SelfDestruct.description: When written: when the self destruct function is used

SellDrones.description: When Written: when selling unwanted drones back to the market

SellExplorationData.description: When Written: when selling exploration data in Cartographics

properties.name: TotalEarnings
properties.description: Total credits received (including for example the 200% bonus if rank 5 with Li Yong Rui)

SellMicroResources.description: This event is logged when a player sells Microresources for cash

SellOrganicData.description: This event records that a player has sold organic data (see ScanOrganic)

SellShipOnRebuy.description: When written: When selling a stored ship to raise funds when on insurance/rebuy screen

SellSuit.description: This event is logged when a player sells a flight suit

SellWeapon.description: This event is logged when a player sells a hand weapon

SendText.description: When written: when a text message is sent to another player

properties.name: To_Localised
properties.description: Unclear under which conditions this field is present, but it sometimes is.

SetUserShipName.description: When written: when assigning a name to the ship in Starport Services

ShieldState.description: When written: when shields are disabled in combat, or recharged

properties.name: ShieldsUp
properties.description: false when disabled, true when restored

ShipLocker.description: Lists the contents of the ship locker, eg at startup. The full contents are written to a separate file, ShipLocker.json. The full list is also written into the journal at startup (if in a ship) and when boarding a ship. The shiplocker.json file is updated when the locker contents are changed.

ShipRedeemed.description: When written: after a new ship has been redeemed

ShipTargeted.description: When written: when the current player selects a new target

properties.name: Power
properties.description: If the player is aligned in powerplay and the target is also aligned to a power

Shipyard.description: When written: when accessing shipyard in a station. The full price list is written to a separate file, in the same folder as the journal, Shipyard.json

ShipyardBuy.description: When Written: when buying a new ship in the shipyard

ShipyardNew.description: When written: after a new ship has been purchased

ShipyardRedeem.description: When written: after a new ship has been unlocked in the Shipyard

ShipyardSell.description: When Written: when selling a ship stored in the shipyard

properties.name: System
properties.description: If ship is in another system

ShipyardSwap.description: When Written: when switching to another ship already stored at this station

ShipyardTransfer.description: When Written: when requesting a ship at another station be transported to this station

Shutdown.description: When written: on a clean shutdown of the game

StartJump.description: When written: at the start of a Hyperspace or Supercruise jump (start of countdown)

Statistics.description: When written: at startup. This line contains the information displayed in the statistics panel on the right side of the cockpit

Status.description: This event is written to Status.json which is updated every few seconds

properties.name: Flags
properties.description:
Flags:
Bit Value      Hex       Meaning
0   1          0000 0001 Docked, (on a landing pad)
1   2          0000 0002 Landed, (on planet surface)
2   4          0000 0004 Landing Gear Down
3   8          0000 0008 Shields Up
4   16         0000 0010 Supercruise
5   32         0000 0020 FlightAssist Off
6   64         0000 0040 Hardpoints Deployed
7   128        0000 0080 In Wing
8   256        0000 0100 LightsOn
9   512        0000 0200 Cargo Scoop Deployed
10  1024       0000 0400 Silent Running,
11  2048       0000 0800 Scooping Fuel
12  4096       0000 1000 Srv Handbrake
13  8192       0000 2000 Srv using Turret view
14  16384      0000 4000 Srv Turret retracted (close to ship)
15  32768      0000 8000 Srv DriveAssist
16  65536      0001 0000 Fsd MassLocked
17  131072     0002 0000 Fsd Charging
18  262144     0004 0000 Fsd Cooldown
19  524288     0008 0000 Low Fuel ( < 25% )
20  1048576    0010 0000 Over Heating ( > 100% )
21  2097152    0020 0000 Has Lat Long
22  4194304    0040 0000 IsInDanger
23  8388608    0080 0000 Being Interdicted
24  16777216   0100 0000 In MainShip
25  33554432   0200 0000 In Fighter
26  67108864   0400 0000 In SRV
27  134217728  0800 0000 Hud in Analysis mode
28  268435456  1000 0000 Night Vision
29  536870912  2000 0000 Altitude from Average radius
30  1073741824 4000 0000 fsdJump
31  2147483648 8000 0000 srvHighBeam

properties.name: Pips
properties.description: an array of 3 integers representing energy distribution (in half-pips)

properties.name: GuiFocus
properties.description:
the selected GUI screen
0  NoFocus
1  InternalPanel (right hand side)
2  ExternalPanel (left hand side)
3  CommsPanel (top)
4  RolePanel (bottom)
5  StationServices
6  GalaxyMap
7  SystemMap
8  Orrery
9  FSS mode
10 SAA mode
11 Codex

properties.name: Latitude
properties.description:
if on or near a planet
The latitude or longitude need to change by 0.02 degrees to trigger an update when flying, or by 0.0005 degrees when in the SRV. If the bit29 is set, the altitude value is based on the planet’s average radius (used at higher altitudes). If the bit29 is not set, the Altitude value is based on a raycast to the actual surface below the ship/srv

properties.name: Longitude
properties.description:
if on or near a planet
The latitude or longitude need to change by 0.02 degrees to trigger an update when flying, or by 0.0005 degrees when in the SRV. If the bit29 is set, the altitude value is based on the planet’s average radius (used at higher altitudes). If the bit29 is not set, the Altitude value is based on a raycast to the actual surface below the ship/srv

properties.name: Flags2
properties.description:
Flags2:
Bit Value      Hex       Meaning
0   1          0000 0001 OnFoot
1   2          0000 0002 InTaxi (or dropship/shuttle)
2   4          0000 0004 InMulticrew (ie in someone else’s ship)
3   8          0000 0008 OnFootInStation
4   16         0000 0010 OnFootOnPlanet
5   32         0000 0020 AimDownSight
6   64         0000 0040 LowOxygen
7   128        0000 0080 LowHealth
8   256        0000 0100 Cold
9   512        0000 0200 Hot
10  1024       0000 0400 VeryCold
11  2048       0000 0800 VeryHot
12  4096       0000 1000 Glide Mode
13  8192       0000 2000 OnFootInHangar
14  16384      0000 4000 OnFootSocialSpace
15  32768      0000 8000 OnFootExterior
16  65536      0001 0001 BreathableAtmosphere
17  131072     0002 0000 Telepresence Multicrew
18  262144     0004 0000 Physical Multicrew
19  524288     0008 0000 Fsd hyperdrive charging
20  1048576    0010 0000 Supercruise Overcharge
21  2097152    0020 0000 Supercruise Assist
22  4194304    0040 0000 NPC Crew Active

StoredModules.description: When written: when first visiting Outfitting, and when the set of stored modules has changed

SuitLoadout.description: This event is logged when starting on-foot or when disembarking

SupercruiseDestinationDrop.description: When dropping out of supercruise at a targeted destination

SupercruiseEntry.description: When written: entering supercruise from normal space

SupercruiseExit.description: When written: leaving supercruise for normal space

SwitchSuitLoadout.description: This event is logged when a player selects a different flight suit from the ship’s locker

Synthesis.description: When written: when synthesis is used to repair or rearm

SystemsShutdown.description: When written: when the player's ship systems shut down (eg in a Thargoid encounter)

TechnologyBroker.description: When written: when using the Technology Broker to unlock new purchasable technology

Touchdown.description: When written: landing on a planet surface

properties.name: PlayerControlled
properties.description: false if ship was recalled from SRV, true if player is landing

TradeMicroResources.description: This event is logged when the player exchanges owned microresources to receive some other type of microresource

TransferMicroResources.description: Written when transferring items between backpack and ship locker

USSDrop.description: When written: when dropping from Supercruise at a Unidentified Signal Source

UnderAttack.description: When written: when under fire (same time as the Under Attack voice message)

Undocked.description: When written: liftoff from a landing pad in a station, outpost or settlement

UpgradeSuit.description: This event is logged when the player upgrades their flight suit

UseConsumable.description: When using an item from the player’s inventory (backpack)

VehicleSwitch.description: When written: when switching control between the main ship and a fighter

WingAdd.description: When written: another player has joined the wing

WingInvite.description: When written: when the player is invited to a wing

WingJoin.description: When written: this player has joined a wing

properties.name: Others
properties.description: Other player names already in wing

WingLeave.description: When written: this player has left a wing
